title: Tallian wine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tallian wine''' was a fine [[Wine/Legends|wine]] from the [[Tallia system/Legends|Tallia system]] favored by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Glorii Profus]] who gave a ritualistic pre-embarkation [[Toast (ritual)/Legends|toast]] to [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] departing for action.<ref name="TCD">''[[The Cestus Deception]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
